_comment: Bevel all 4 edges incident to the +Z tip of an octahedron. Tip cap (selCount=4 valence=4) is now EXACT-match Blender via materializeAdjCapGeneric (cubic_subdiv with n=4 + profile sampler that projects (BV_a + BV_b)/2 onto the shared bev edge). Remaining XFAIL is at the 4 equator vertices (selCount=1 valence=4): vibe3d's offsetMeet slides BVs in the face plane while Blender slides them toward the opposite tip — different code path (computeBVPositions / computeSlideDirForEdge), unrelated to the cap algorithm.
